description_long: This is a Timex wristwatch featuring a round, dark metal case and a tan leather strap with white stitching. The dial is olive green with large, bold Arabic numerals and three subdials, indicating a chronograph function. The watch face includes luminous hands and markers, as well as a date window between the 4 and 5 o'clock positions. The crown and two pushers are located on the right side of the case, allowing for adjustment and chronograph operation. The strap is secured with a traditional buckle and has multiple adjustment holes for sizing. The watch is displayed on a black stand with the Timex logo prominently printed on the front.
description: A Timex chronograph wristwatch with a dark metal case, olive green dial, and tan leather strap, displayed on a black stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the olive green dial, three subdials, luminous hands, Arabic numerals, and the Timex logo on both the dial and the stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and chronograph pushers, as well as the curvature of the leather strap.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tan leather strap with white stitching and the adjustment holes, with the case mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and strap curvature, with no visible crown or pushers.
attribute_brand_logo: The Timex logo is printed in white on the upper center of the dial and also on the front of the black display stand.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is olive green with large white Arabic numerals at each hour, three subdials for chronograph functions, luminous hands and markers, and a date window between 4 and 5 o'clock. The style is functional and sporty, with clear, legible markings and a multi-layered chronograph layout.
attribute_strap_type: Tan leather strap with white stitching and a traditional buckle, featuring multiple adjustment holes.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, and a date window. Luminous elements are present on the hands and hour markers.
